---

name: Workshop Event Request
about: Request creation of a Way Back Home event for your workshop
title: "[Event Request] <event-code>"
labels: event-request
assignees: ''
-------------

## Workshop Information

**Event Code**
Short unique identifier participants will use (example: `gdg-athens-2025`)

**Workshop Name**
Full name of the event

**Organizer Name**

**Organization / Community**
(e.g. GDG Athens, Google Developer Student Club, University)

**Workshop Date**

**Estimated Participants**

---

## Event Configuration

Default event code used in the map:

```
/e/<event-code>
```

Example:

```
https://waybackhome.eu/e/gdg-athens-2025
```

---

## Notes (optional)

Anything special we should know (duration, multi-session workshop, etc.)
